elements.text: You and your best friend have known each other since middle school. You are starting to have some different interests, and you worry that you won't understand each other as you get older. When you think about major life events, such as your wedding or having kids, you expect your best friend to be...

elements.name: your_closest_friend--social_situations--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
